epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11: fear/avoidance of situations where escape may be difficult; persistent (≥6 months) with impairment

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often co-diagnosed with panic disorder; identification in APS/CAPS varies
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: CBT with exposure and SSRIs; gradual functional rehabilitation
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to exposure-based CBT and functional support services
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Availability of SSRIs and psychosocial services in CAPS where present
